541(अ) 21.07.2009 13 310 6.5.1989 26 835(अ) 13.10.2010 -- 3 of 12 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Department of Personnel and Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 19th December, 2018 G.S.R. 1221(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 3 of the All India Services Act, 1951 (61 of 1951), read with sub-rules (1) and (2) of rule 4 of the Indian Administrative Service (Cadre) Rules, 1954, the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Haryana, hereby makes the following regulations further to amend the Indian Administrative Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1955, namely:─ 1. (1) These Regulations may be called the Indian Administrative Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Third Amendment Regulations, 2018. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Administrative Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1955, in the Schedule, for the heading “Haryana” and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be substituted namely:─ “Haryana Senior Duty Posts under the State Government 117 Chief Secretary to the Government 1 Additional Chief Secretary-cum-Financial Commissioner 1 Principal Secretary to the Chief Minister 1 Financial Commissioner/Principal Secretary 12 Special Principal Secretary to Chief Minister 1 Secretary to Government 9 Secretary to Governor 1 Chief Electoral Officer 1 Registrar, Cooperative Societies 1 Director General, State Transport 1 Commissioners of Divisions 6 Transport Commissioner 1 Excise and Taxation Commissioner 1 Resident Commissioner, Haryana 1 Director General, Agriculture 1 Director General, Town & Country Planning -cum-Urban Estate and Colonization 1 Director General, Higher Education 1 Director General, Technical Education 1 Director General, Industries & Commerce 1 Commissioner, Food and Drugs Administration 1 Labour Commissioner 1 Director General/Commissioner 1 Director General, Information, Public Relations, Cultural Affairs, Languages and Grievances 1 Director General, Urban Local Bodies 1 -- 4 of 12 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 5 Additional Principal Secretary to Chief Minister 1 Spl. December, 2018 G.S.R. 1222(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 3 of the All India Services Act, 1951 (61 of 1951), the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Haryana hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Indian Administrative Service (Pay) Rules, 2016, namely: ─ 1. (1) These rules may be called the Indian Administrative Service (Pay) Third Amendment Rules, 2018. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the official Gazette. -- 9 of 12 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] 2. In the Indian Administrative Service (Pay) Rules, 2016, in Schedule II,– (a) in Part A relating to Posts carrying pay above the Senior Scale of pay of the Indian Administrative Service under the State Governments, in the table, for the entry “Haryana” occurring in the first column and corresponding entries in the second column, the following shall be substituted namely:─ “Haryana Chief Secretary to the Government Level 17 in the pay matrix Additional Chief Secretary-cum- Financial Commissioner Level 17 in the pay matrix Principal Secretary to the Chief Minister Level 17 in the pay matrix Financial Commissioner/Principal Secretary Level 15 in the pay matrix Special Principal Secretary to Chief Minister Level 15 in the pay matrix Secretary to Government Level 14 in the pay matrix Secretary to Governor Level 14 in the pay matrix Chief Electoral Officer Level 14 in the pay matrix Registrar, Co-operative Societies Level 14 in the pay matrix Director General State Transport Level pay matrix Director General, Higher Education Level 14 in the pay matrix Director General, Technical Education Level 14 in the pay matrix Director General, Industries & Commerce Level 14 in the pay matrix Commissioner, Food and Drugs Administration Level 14 in the pay matrix Labour Commissioner Level 14 in the pay matrix Director General/Commissioner Level 14 in the pay matrix Director General,
